name: AIR-MM v2 Debug Prototype
author: John McCray
blurb: Experimental non-record submission exploring Adaptive Importance Routing Memory Model (AIR-MM). Combines a learned token-importance gate with a positional recency signal through a lightweight combiner to selectively scale residual updates per token. Local fast-debug results (CPU, 128-dim, 4-layer, 10 steps) show stable training and small directional improvements; GPU-scale validation pending. val_bpb below is from FAST_DEBUG only and is not comparable to leaderboard scores.
